name: Gmail Checker
description: GAS-based email checker that monitors inbox and notifies Nano via Telegram. Scheduled checks at noon and 9pm Costa Rica time.

name: Mission Control Dashboard
description: Next.js dashboard for tracking tasks (Kanban), projects, memory, docs and team. Linear-inspired dark design.

name: Workspace Foundation
description: OpenClaw setup, identity configuration, GitHub repository, SOUL/USER/TOOLS/MEMORY files. The base layer.

name: Media Processing Pipeline
description: Photo (RAW) and video processing capabilities. FFmpeg for video, ImageMagick for photos. Instagram workflow.

name: Broc Migration Strategy
description: Migration plan from Clawi.ai to personal VPS. Includes cost analysis ($5-12/mes), dual-agent setup, data sync strategy.
